+  greater than `k` and any two distinct vertices are `k`-vertex-reachable.

+/-- `G.deleteVerts s` is the graph where all vertices in `s` are isolated. -/
+def deleteVerts (G : SimpleGraph V) (s : Set V) : SimpleGraph V where
+  Adj u v := u ∉ s ∧ v ∉ s ∧ G.Adj u v
+  symm _ _ h := ⟨h.2.1, h.1, h.2.2.symm⟩

+lemma deleteVerts_empty : G.deleteVerts ∅ = G := by
+  ext; simp [deleteVerts]

+lemma deleteVerts_subset_le (s : Set V) : G.deleteVerts s ≤ G :=
+  fun _ _ h ↦ h.2.2

+  fun _ hs hv hu ↦ (h hs hu hv).symm

+This file defines the Tate normal form of Weierstrass equations of elliptic curves. It

+# The pointwise monoidal strucutre on the product of families of monoidal categories
+
+Given a family of monoidal categories `C i`, we define a monoidal structure on
+`Π i, C i` where the tensor product is defined pointwise.

+  tensorObj X Y := fun i ↦ X i ⊗ Y i
+  whiskerLeft X _ _ f := fun i ↦ X i ◁ f i
+  whiskerRight f Z := fun i ↦ f i ▷ Z i
+  tensorHom f g := fun i ↦ f i ⊗ g i
+  tensorUnit := fun i ↦ 𝟙_ (C i)

+  tensor_comp _ _ _ _ := by ext i; aesop

+  id_whiskerRight _ _ := by ext i; aesop
+  associator_naturality _ _ _ := by ext i; aesop
+  leftUnitor_naturality _ := by ext i; aesop
+  rightUnitor_naturality _ := by ext i; aesop
+  pentagon _ _ _ _ := by ext i; aesop
+  triangle _ _ := by ext i; aesop
